name: Artichoke Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine equal amounts of Parmesan cheese and mayonnaise in a bowl.
2. Add the garlic powder to the mixture.
3. Mix in the artichoke hearts until combined with the cheese mixture.
4. The dip can be served cold or heated for 10 to 20 minutes at 350°F (175°C) in an oven, until the cheese is melted. Avoid heating it in a microwave.
5. Serve with chips or as a spread on French bread.
